label: Divination & Omens · การทำนาย
note: Omen-reading, dream and lot divination (mo duu).

scripts.label: Thai · อักษรไทย

lede: Divination & Omens · การทำนาย accounts for 1 catalogued manuscript, 1 of them flagged research-priority. Nearly all (100%) are written in Thai · อักษรไทย script.

findings.title: Already legible to a machine
findings.gloss: The manuscripts with the most recognised Thai text — the leading edge of the whole point: making a living tradition readable to a model and not only to a scholar.
